connections.def: from 1210; a slave (literal or figurative, involuntary or voluntary; frequently, therefore in a qualified sense of subjection or subserviency):--bond(-man), servant. see GREEK for
from 4862 and 1199; a joint tie, i.e. ligament, (figuratively) uniting principle, control:--band, bond. see GREEK for 4862 see GREEK for
